name: Zerodha Trading Platform — Resilient Inter-Service Calls
scenario: Add Resilience4j circuit breakers to the Zerodha trading platform. When market-service goes down, trades shouldn't fail completely — return cached prices with tradeable=false. When payment-service is overloaded, throw a meaningful exception instead of waiting 30 seconds. Test all resilience patterns.
description: Add @CircuitBreaker, @Retry, and @RateLimiter to order-service's downstream calls. Configure meaningful fallbacks. Test circuit state transitions. Verify /actuator/health shows circuit state.

core.description: `MarketService.getStockQuote(symbol)` with @CircuitBreaker('market-service') + @Retry('market-service'). Fallback: return cached quote (ConcurrentHashMap) with tradeable=false. Update cache on successful calls.

`PaymentService.processPayment(userId, amount)` with @CircuitBreaker('payment-service'). Fallback throws `PaymentServiceUnavailableException` (don't silently accept — payments must work or fail explicitly).

application.properties: market-service CB (sliding-window=10, min-calls=5, threshold=50%, wait=60s), market-service Retry (max-attempts=3, wait=500ms). payment-service CB (threshold=60%, wait=30s). register-health-indicator=true for both.

`TradeService.executeTrade(userId, symbol, qty)`: calls MarketService.getStockQuote() and PaymentService.processPayment(). Handles MarketUnavailableException (from fallback) and PaymentServiceUnavailableException separately.

@SpringBootTest tests (5 tests): success, market fallback returns cached price (tradeable=false → trade not executed), market circuit OPENS after 6 failures, payment CB open → PaymentServiceUnavailableException, circuit OPEN shows in /actuator/health.
management.health.circuitbreakers.enabled=true. Actuator health test verifies OPEN state appears in /actuator/health response.

bonus.description: Add @TimeLimiter to market-service call: max 2 seconds wait before fallback. Test: mock market-service to sleep 3s, verify TimeLimiter triggers fallback before 2s.
Add @Bulkhead to payment-service: max 5 concurrent calls. Test: start 10 concurrent threads calling processPayment(); assert at least 5 get BulkheadFullException.

Add custom event listeners: on circuit OPEN → log 'CIRCUIT OPENED for {service} — alerting on-call team'. On circuit CLOSE → log 'CIRCUIT CLOSED for {service} — service recovered'. Use CircuitBreaker.EventPublisher.

data_to_use:
Circuit breaker test scenarios:
- Normal: getQuote('TCS') → market-service returns {price:3890, tradeable:true} → trade executes
- Market down (1 failure): fallback returns cached price with tradeable=false → 'market data unavailable'
- Market CB opens (6 failures): all subsequent calls use cached fallback immediately
- Payment CB opens: PaymentServiceUnavailableException thrown → 503 response

Config thresholds for tests:
- sliding-window-size=5, minimum-calls=3, failure-rate-threshold=60%
- wait-duration=2s (short for testing)
example_output:
# Normal trade:
GET /api/stocks/TCS/quote → {price:3890, tradeable:true}
Trade executed: TRD-TCS-10@3890

# market-service DOWN (fallback):
[FALLBACK] TCS: cached price 3890.00 (tradeable=false)
Trade rejected: market data unavailable for TCS

# After 6 failures (circuit OPEN):
Circuit market-service: OPEN
[CIRCUIT OPEN] Fallback immediately for TCS

# /actuator/health:
{"circuitBreakers":{"market-service":{"state":"OPEN","failureRate":"60.0%"}}}

# Tests:
✓ executeTrade_success
✓ marketFallback_tradeable_false
✓ marketCircuit_opensAfter6Failures
✓ paymentCircuit_throwsUnavailable
✓ openCircuit_showsInActuatorHealth
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. Fallback signature: same return type + same params + Exception. Reset circuit in @BeforeEach: registry.circuitBreaker('name').reset(). For circuit open test: use @TestPropertySource to set low thresholds (sliding-window=5, min-calls=3, threshold=60%). cb.transitionToHalfOpenState() for HALF-OPEN tests (avoids Thread.sleep).
submission_instructions: Push to GitHub. All 5 @SpringBootTest tests pass. README explains the resilience strategy for each service call.
tips_for_success: Wrap Feign calls in a @Service method — @CircuitBreaker doesn't work on @FeignClient interfaces
Fallback must have same return type and parameters + Exception at end
@TestPropertySource low thresholds: sliding-window=5, min-calls=3, threshold=60% — triggers CB in fewer calls
registry.circuitBreaker('name').reset() in @BeforeEach: prevent test state bleed
Payment fallback that throws: the fallback method can throw an exception — just declare the throws clause
concepts_reinforced: CLOSED → OPEN → HALF-OPEN → CLOSED state machine
Actuator health with circuit breaker state
